UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile within the application, linked to the authentication system but storing application-specific details like role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. (Primary Key)

email.description: Email address of the user, used for communication and identification.

role.description: Role of the user in the application, determining access levels and dashboard views.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was initially created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

IncomeDna.title: IncomeDna
IncomeDna.description: Stores the AI-generated income profile for a worker, providing insights into their earning patterns.

id.description: Unique identifier for the IncomeDna entity. (Primary Key)

workerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the worker this income DNA belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 IncomeDna)

highActivityDays.description: A list of days of the week identified as high-activity and potentially high-earning days for the worker.

expectedWeeklyEarnings.description: The AI-predicted estimated weekly earnings for the worker.

lastAnalyzedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this income DNA profile was last updated or analyzed by the AI.

Claim.title: Claim
Claim.description: Represents an insurance claim filed by a gig worker.

userId.description: The UID of the worker filing the claim.

definition.description: Stores global claims, secured by a denormalized userId field.
